items.title: George Pickens: Tag deadline passes
items.body_text: Pickens is set to play the 2026 season on the one-year, $27.3 million franchise tag after he and the Cowboys did not reach a long-term extension before Wednesday's deadline, Todd Archer of ESPN.com reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Travis Etienne: Set to combine with Kamara
items.body_text: Etienne's teammate, Alvin Kamara, has reportedly agreed to remain with the Saints this season on a reworked contract, Arye Pulli of USA Today reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Alvin Kamara: Finalizing new deal with Saints
items.body_text: Kamara and New Orleans are finalizing terms on a new contract, Nick Underhill of NewOrleans.Football reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Patrick Mahomes: Aims to play Week 1
items.body_text: Mahomes (knee) continues to aim to be ready for the Chiefs' regular-season opener against the Broncos on Monday, Sept. 14, Kevin Patra of NFL.com reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Bhayshul Tuten: Backfield timeshare likely
items.body_text: In the wake of the offseason departure of Travis Etienne, John Shipley of SI.com notes that "all signs point" to the Jaguars employing a timeshare backfield led by Tuten and Chris Rodriguez (foot). Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
